docs.text: Home Welcome to my personal notes
docs.title: Home

docs.text: ReactJs Quick Start Components A component is a peice of the UI that contains its own logic JavaScript functions that return markup React component names must always start with a capital letter function MyButton () { return ( < button > I ' m a button < /button> ); } - Now I can use this component in another component export default function MyApp () { return ( < div > < h1 > Welcome to my app < /h1> < MyButton /> < /div> ); } Styles Using CSS classNames < img className = "avatar" /> - In a CSS file: /* In your CSS */ . avatar { border - radius : 50 % ; }
docs.title: ReactJs Quick Start
